response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video to distinguish between the talk segment and the song performance. I identified the song "Black Rock Shooter" through the on-screen text "ブラック★ロックシューター" and "作詞・作曲: ryo (supercell)". I performed a search using the query `"ブラック★ロックシューター" ryo supercell Japanese and English lyrics` and used the returned lyrics for the JSON object.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory segment followed by a virtual performance of the song "Black Rock Shooter" by two virtual idols.

scenes.description: Introductory dialogue segment before the song performance.
Performance of the song "Black Rock Shooter". On-screen text indicates the song title and artist.
scenes.song_title: ブラック★ロックシューター (Black Rock Shooter)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ブラックロックシューター 
何処へ行ったの? 
聞こえますか? 
あとどれだけ叫べばいいのだろう 
あとどれだけ泣けばいいのだろう 
もうやめて 
わたしはもう走れない 
いつか夢見た世界が閉じる...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Black Rock Shooter, where did you go? Can you hear me? 
How much more do I have to scream? 
How much more do I have to cry? 
Stop it already, I can't run anymore 
The world I once dreamed of is closing...
